allow: Bash(sudo ip link add vethwan0 type veth peer name vethwan1)

Bash(sudo ip addr add 192.168.1.2/24 dev vethlan1)

Bash(bash -c '
encode_dns_name\(\) {
    local fqdn="$1" label hex=""
    local IFS=.
    for label in $fqdn; do
        hex+=$\(printf "%02x:" "${#label}"\)
        hex+=$\(printf "%s" "$label" | xxd -p -c256 | sed "s/\\\(..\\\)/\\1:/g"\)
    done
    hex+="00"
    echo "$hex"
}
encode_dns_name "aftr.dslite.example.com"
')
